core.title: Build Log
core.description: Raw sessions documenting the actual build process. PHP, JSON, site architecture, deployment decisions, and real-time problem solving.

content.about: The Build Log is the closest thing to pair programming with an AI-first developer. Watch actual work happen: debugging, refactoring, deploying, and decision-making in real time.
content.what_to_expect: Unedited Zoom screencasts of active development work. Files get created, broken, and fixed on camera.

seo.meta_description: Raw build sessions documenting PHP, JSON architecture, site builds, and deployment decisions in real time.
